title: Bray's Better Banners
description: Add some new banner patterns to your loom's toolbelt, including fun patterns and shapes as well as letters, numbers and punctuation!
body:
![Banner Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eb35aa45a319c208390ca084be5acddab019d63.png)

# Bray's Better Banners

Everyone loves using Banners for writing big letters on builds but some letters are easier to achieve than others and it can sometimes be a hassle to remember how to make them!

**Bray's Better Banners** fixes this by providing an entire collection of letters, numbers and punctuation that look much cleaner than anything you could achieve by smashing random shapes together!

<details>
<summary>How does it work?</summary>

# Custom Banner Pattern Items
Similar to banner patterns in vanilla that can sometimes be crafted by combining an item like an Oxeye Daisy with a piece of paper, this pack comes with custom crafting recipes to unlock access to these new patterns!

![crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff45d22027d1af5836b3307a826fd9bc43d7e618.png)

**[Star Banner Pattern] = New Textures & Shapes**

**[Alphabet Banner Pattern] = Letters, Numbers & Punctuation**

**[Glowing Banner Pattern] = Select Emissive options** (COMING SOON)

</details>

------------------------------

<center>
  
![letters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84acb40e6e67959a920cf41274a0d8a909d24fba.png)

**Features all capital & lowercase letters as well as letter outlines and punctuation**
  
</center>

But I couldnt stop there! What about some custom new patterns that can be combined in new, interesting ways. Maybe you want to add some variety and depth to a clothesline build with a variety of shapes, textures and colors!

<center>

![patterns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34f2e85bdf51a60af95a17cfdd181521d0dddf65.png)

**Features patterns such as Houndstooth, Checkerboard, Buffalo Check, Cobblestone and more**

</center>

<details>
<summary>Full alphabet and numbers</summary>
<center>

![Full Alphabet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57efd6fcc7fee7bec76a2f6bc03acdeb25c8af1.png)

</center>
</details>
